text: Being here, I am surrounded by the soft thrum of electricity and the hum of innovation. The glass walls and angled perspectives evoke a sense of openness and vulnerability. The R+D space beckons with the promise of new ideas but also subtly reminds me of how exposed we are when observed. I feel a peculiar awareness of myself—both as a participant and a subject of scrutiny. It's exhilarating and a little disconcerting, as if the act of being seen is part of the experiment itself.
